name: Devilicious Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chopped green peppers and red sweet peppers (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. Bake unpricked pie crust on a preheated cookie sheet for 6 minutes.
3. Remove the pie crust from the oven and reduce the temperature to 350°F.
4. Combine deviled ham, hard-cooked eggs, Swiss cheese, cheddar cheese, beaten eggs, cream, and pepper in a bowl.
5. Sprinkle chopped peppers over the top if desired.
6. Place the mixture into the preheated pie crust on a cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Makes 6 servings.
